rsvp.title: Manage RSVPs
rsvp.manual-note: for players who responded via phone, text, or in person.

empty.title: No game nights planned yet
empty.description: Invite players to plan a game night.

delete.title: Delete game night
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this game night "{{title}}"? This cannot be reversed and will delete all associated RSVPs.

create.title: Create new Game Night
create.description: Fill out the form to create a new game night event.

edit.title: Edit Game Night
edit.description: Update the details of this game night event.

invited-players.label: Invited players
invited-players.description: Select players to invite to this game night

suggested-games.label: Suggested games
suggested-games.description: Select games that you suggest to play during this game night
